principles: Dashboard zeigt Tageslage aus data/YYYY-MM-DD/findings.json, nicht nur Run-Delta.
Emergency RSS writer ist Fallback, nicht Lagebild.
Einzelne Quellenfehler begrenzen Coverage, brechen aber nicht den Feed.

observe.title: Funded: US$37 billion was promised to SEA climate, where did it go?
observe.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
observe.summary: I want to tell you about a number that should make every climate founder in Southeast Asia angry. US$37 billion. That’s the combined JETP commitment across Indonesia and Vietnam alone. Indonesia signed for US$21.6 billion. Vietnam signed for US$15.5 billion. These aren’t projections or targets. These are commitments. Money that governments and international partners put […] The post Funded: US$37 billion was promise…
observe.relevance_reason: APAC Trend Radar (+3.0); Southeast Asia (+2.0); founder (+2.0); recent (+1.0); watchgraph region southeast_asia: Indonesia, Vietnam (+2.0)
observe.recommended_action: Beobachten, Quelle sichern und bei Wiederholung erneut bewerten.

observe.title: はてブのコメントで警告もらった
observe.summary: 死ねだの死んだほうがいいだの殺したいだの書いてたら、 「おめー、ガイドライン違反のコメント多すぎ、次やったら無警告強制でアカウント非公開にするからな、これが最後の警告」 というお知らせをはてなからもらったのだが、 「ほんとならとっくに非公開処置してるんだけど、おめえは長年はてな使ってっからちょっとだ...
observe.recommended_action: Beobachten, Quelle sichern und bei Wiederholung erneut bewerten.
